name: ntp
description: Two Cisco IOS routers on one subnet demonstrating NTP. R1 is the authoritative time source (ntp master 3) with NTP MD5 authentication; R2 is the client (ntp server 10.10.10.1 key 1) and syncs to stratum 4. Base for the NTP configuration article.

nodes.name: R1
nodes.extra: ntp master 3 (stratum 3, reference .LOCL.); NTP MD5 key 1; authoritative time source

nodes.name: R2
nodes.extra: ntp server 10.10.10.1 key 1; client, synchronises to stratum 4
